You can also subscribe to exclusively curated packages from our subscription web page: https://www.omahasteaks.com/shop/Subscription

templates.name: What should I do with my cooler once I receive my products?
templates.content: Our rugged, reusable cooler - like aluminum, glass, and paper - can be recycled time and time again. Many of our customers enjoy reusing their coolers at picnics, at the beach, or for storage. If you can't find a "re-use" for your cooler, please call your local recycling center to see if they will accept it.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: You can give us a call at 1-800-960-8400 or let me know if I can help via text, it may be faster.

templates.name: Where does your beef come from?
templates.content: All our beef is sourced from the finest producers in the USA and North America. The majority of Omaha Steaks beef, veal, chicken, and lamb are products of the United States, though we do have some ground beef and pork that are sourced from Canada and some lamb that is sourced from New Zealand.

templates.name: Why did I only get one shipping notification when I placed multiple orders?
templates.content: You'll receive a shipping notification for the first shipment in your order. This notification includes a link that allows you to monitor the status of each of the other shipments in that order.

templates.name: Do you ship internationally?
templates.content: We currently ship to all 50 States, Canada, the U.S Virgin Islands, and Puerto Rico.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: We have a rewards/referral program where you can earn points to redeem on future purchases. Check it out here - https://www.omahasteaks.com/info/Steaklover-Rewards

templates.name: How long does the product stay cool after being shipped?
templates.content: With the dry ice in the cooler the products can last up to 24 hours, but we recommend transfering the products, still in their original boxes, immediately to the freezer upon receiving your cooler.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Your package will arrive in 3-10 business days from the day you place your order. We'll also provide an estimated date during checkout.

templates.name: Escalation template
templates.content: Let me check on this for you, and I'll get back to you within 24 hrs.

templates.name: How are your steaks packed?
templates.content: Our steaks are individually vacuum-sealed which locks in their freshness and natural flavor. We have some great specials on our steaks today. Check them out here: https://www.omahasteaks.com/buy/Steaks

templates.name: How to ship to multiple addresses / persons ?
templates.content: To ship to multiple addresses, simply add all the items to your cart and visit your cart here: http://sms.omahasteaks.com/sl/fxOxzi_l You'll find the "Send to Someone Else" option beside each item. During checkout, you can conveniently enter different shipping addresses for each person.

templates.content: In support of giving you more, most of our shipments must be at least $49.00 to qualify for purchase and delivery. You can also join our Steaklover Rewards Gold program for $39.99/year to get FREE shipping on every shipment of $79.99+, plus 2x Points on every order, dollars off your purchase, a FREE gift, and no minimum purchase requirement: https://www.omahasteaks.com/info/Steaklover-Rewards

templates.name: Are your burgers/ground beef lean?
templates.content: Omaha Steaks Ultra-Premium Ground Beef and gourmet burgers are crafted from our own grain-finished beef with an 80/20 lean-to-fat ratio which makes them ultra-juicy. Check out current deals on our gourmet burgers and ground beef: https://www.omahasteaks.com/buy/Burgers-and-Franks/Gourmet-Burgers

templates.name: Does everything come delivered frozen?
templates.content: Actually, our foods are flash-frozen. We know that in many ways, frozen is better than fresh. All our products come frozen, and coolers are packed with dry ice to ensure they are frozen on delivery. https://www.omahasteaks.com/blog/a-fresh-take-on-frozen-food/

Just follow this link to our Custom Cuts page to contact us and get started today: https://www.omahasteaks.com/products/Custom-Cuts

templates.name: Why is the return address on my package not an Omaha, NE address?
templates.content: We provide a local return address to a food bank for undeliverable packages. This is to salvage any products from spoiling so that they can be used at the food bank.

templates.name: Do you offer meals that can be prepared quickly?
templates.content: We offer a variety of freezer-to-oven and skillet meals that can be made quickly and conveniently. You can check them out here: https://www.omahasteaks.com/buy/Meals-Sides-and-Desserts/All-Meals

templates.name: Are your steaks rated prime?
templates.content: We often get asked about USDA grading and while nearly all of the beef we source is USDA Choice and USDA Prime, these grades are only one small factor in our beef selection. Omaha Steaks and the Simon family have been grading and selecting beef using proprietary processes since 1917, decades before the Agricultural Marketing Service of the USDA became responsible for beef grading in 1939. We are America's Original Butcher. No one has been "grading" steak longer than Omaha Steaks and no one knows beef better than we do. The USDA grade of beef depends on really just one factor: marbling. So, if you are looking for a basic grade on our steak, you won't find it because we consider at least 5 different variables (of which, marbling is one) when determining if an Omaha Steak is to become a Gourmet, Butcher's Cut, or a Private Reserve steak.

templates.name: Brand ambassador / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! You can sign up for our affiliate program here: https://www.omahasteaks.com/info/Affiliate-Program

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: I can check if that's possible. What's the order number, email address, and the change you'd like to make?

templates.name: Do your meats have any vaccines?
templates.content:
We believe our suppliers must be committed to raising healthy animals for a wholesome meat supply, and this may include the use of antibiotics administered as a feed additive. According to the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) and the U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA), the use of antibiotics in animals presents virtually no risk to consumers.

Regarding mRNA vaccines that prevent COVID-19, the USDA's current list of licensed veterinary biologics does not include any vaccines of this type for use in animals. Omaha Steaks products do not contain this vaccine in them.

templates.name: Where do I add the discount?
templates.content: You'll find the discount box in your shopping cart here: https://www.omahasteaks.com/shop/Shopping-Cart. It's below the "Cart Summary" section under "Promo Code". Here's a screenshot for reference: https://prnt.sc/wnC2Fl6AEQZk

templates.name: How to place an order for multiple recipients?
templates.content:
To place an order for multiple recipients, follow these steps: 

1. Select the item you wish to add to your cart. 
2. Once the item is added, click on "View Cart." 
3. In the cart, you should see the word "Cart" and right below it, there should be a square with a plus sign to "add recipient." 
4. Click on the square with the plus sign to add another recipient's name along with the same product. 
5. Once all recipients have been added, proceed to checkout. 
6. During checkout, you will be able to add each recipient's address before entering your payment information.

templates.name: Do you ever pack your items to serve 2 people/ How many persons can your items serve?
templates.content: Quantities come in 2 or 4, but you can always keep them in the freezer for another day.

templates.name: If I choose the gift box, does it show that package/box is from Omaha Steaks?
templates.content: The gift wrapping will still display Omaha Steaks. However, we do provide tracking information once the order ships, allowing you to monitor its status every step of the way.

templates.name: Manage subscription (asking to add more items)
templates.content:
At the moment, subscription management allows you to adjust your next order date, skip an order, change your frequency, swap items, or cancel the subscription by signing into your account on our website. I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

However, I'd be happy to double-check this with the team for you. Could you please provide your email address?
